title: Delisting of Securities of NantHealth, Inc.; Surgalign Holdings, Inc.; Lordstown Motors Corp.; iMedia Brands, Inc.; Crescera Capital Acquisition Corp.; Better World Acquisition Corp.; Tattooed Chef, Inc.; and Alpine Summit Energy Partners, Inc. from The Nasdaq Stock Market
text: NEW YORK, July 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the common stock of NantHealth, Inc. NantHealth, Inc.'s securities were suspended on May 24, 2023, and have not traded on Nasdaq since that time.

title: Nasdaq set for falls after Netflix, Tesla disappointments
text: US stocks are expected to retreat at the open on Thursday, giving back some of their recent gains led by the Nasdaq as the latest quarterly updates from two tech giants disappointed after-hours. Shares of Netflix dropped 8% after the streaming giant saw its $8.19 billion in second-quarter revenue fall short of the $8.3 billion anticipated by analysts.

title: Nasdaq halts plans to launch crypto custody service due to regulatory uncertainty
text: (Kitco News) - Nasdaq announced that it is halting its plans to launch a crypto custody service due to the uncertain regulatory conditions in the U.S., remains dedicated to digital assets.

title: Delisting of Securities of Puhui Wealth Investment Management Co., Ltd.; National Energy Services Reunited Corp.; Bed Bath & Beyond Inc.; IMV Inc.; Celyad Oncology SA; Aptinyx Inc.; Athenex, Inc.; Greencity Acquisition Corporation; QualTek Services Inc.; Bellicum Pharmaceuticals, Inc.; Wejo Group Limited; Cyxtera Technologies, Inc.; HTG Molecular Diagnostics, Inc.; Unico American Corporation; PolarityTE, Inc.; Oncorus, Inc.; and OncoSec Medical Incorporated from The Nasdaq Stock Market
text: NEW YORK, July 06, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market announced today that it will delist the ordinary shares of Puhui Wealth Investment Management Co., Ltd.
